introSection: Cowabunga Carts is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. It is located in the Nickelodeon Land themed area.
fullText: Cowabunga Carts is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. It is located in the Nickelodeon Land themed area.
